flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeast Mississippi Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (21.9% → 18.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast Mississippi Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northeast Mississippi Community College are 4% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.1k vs $32.9k).
